summary: Market Update: S&P 500 -1.74% (6,477.16), Nasdaq -2.38%. Geopolitical tensions in Iran continue to drive market anxiety, pushing oil prices higher and inflating treasury yields.
Market Update: S&P 500 -1.7% (6,477.16), Nasdaq -2.4%. Indices facing continued downward pressure from Iran conflict and inflation concerns.

briefing: Weekend market sentiment reflects cautious optimism. Tech leads a mild rebound as investors look ahead to earnings.
